text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide smart.who.int.immunizations

Profile: SMARTImplementationGuide

Immunizations

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ImplementationGuide/smart.who.int.immunizations

WHO Immunization Implementaiton Guide

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology

resource.name: Immunization Administrative Area
resource.description: The service delivery location (location name, city, municipality, town or village) where the vaccine administration occurred

resource.name: Immunization Country of Vaccination
resource.description: The service delivery country where the vaccine administration occurred

resource.name: Immunization Due Date of Next Dose
resource.description: The service delivery location (location name, city, municipality, town or village) where the vaccine administration occurred

resource.name: Immunization Live Vaccine
resource.description: Uses a living but weakened version of the virus or one that is very similar

resource.name: Immunization Market Authorization Holder
resource.description: Name of the market authorization holder of the vaccine received. If market authorization holder is unknown, vaccine manufacturer is REQUIRED

resource.name: Immunization Type of Dose
resource.description: The type of dose in a series that the client received

resource.name: Immunization Vaccine Brand
resource.description: The brand or trade name used to refer to the vaccine received

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
resource.description: Provide immunization communication

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles Ongoing Transmission
resource.description: Countries with ongoing transmission in which the risk of measles mortality remains high (countries that provide first dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV) at 9 months and second dose of MCV at 15 months)

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Low transmission
resource.description: Countries with low levels of measles transmission (countries that provide first dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV) at 12 months and second dose of MCV at 15 months)

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.MCV dose 0
resource.description: Measles-containing vaccine dose 0 (MCV0) administration

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.MR
resource.description: Provide measles immunization

resource.name: IMMZ.D2.DT.Measles.Supplementary dose
resource.description: Measles-containing vaccine (MCV) supplementary dose administration
